Name: Noah
Text: Are you okay? My goodness... You’re bleeding...!

Name: Noah
Text: You need to go to the hospital!

Name: Student
Text: Do I really have to go to the hospital?

Name: Student
Text: I read online that doctors will try to recommend expensive treatments just to make money!

Name: Noah
Text: Who on earth told you that?

Name: Student
Toast1: "…From now on, you cannot go to the hospital! The evil doctors have conspired to charge more money! …"

Name: Noah
Text: This is fake news! If you’re hurt, you need to go to the hospital.

Name: Noah
Text: You shouldn’t believe everything you read from unknown sources with no credibility.
Toast1: "There’s a lot of fake news on the internet."
column7: "Make sure to check the source and credibility."

Name: Student
Text: I lost my phone, so I can’t even use the AI ‘Eve’...

Name: Noah
Text: Sigh... Hang on. I’ll help you.
